input.taskBrief: Tighten repair-path guidance so agents stop rerunning forge when freshness repair is the real next step.
input.currentSkill:
Forge is the workflow layer.

- active slice, implementation-ready: run wiki forge run <project> <slice> --repo <path>
- stale, conflicting, or failed state: use the repair branch below, then return to wiki forge run
input.acceptanceCriteria: Preserve command authority, make checkpoint and maintain authoritative for freshness, and tell the agent to use concrete repair commands when verify/close fails for stale-page debt.
input.repoContext: This repo uses sync:local after skill edits and requires an agent restart after syncing installed skill copies.

input.taskBrief: Clarify that generated project summary pages are derived outputs and should be refreshed through sync/maintain before manual edits.
input.currentSkill:
Wiki is for memory, verification, retrieval, and research filing.

Generated pages may exist.
input.acceptanceCriteria: Make generated pages explicit, prefer sync or maintain first, and keep the distinction between wiki maintenance and forge workflow.
input.repoContext: The repo treats project summary pages as derived knowledge surfaces and requires sync:local plus restart only when skill files themselves change.
